manager.description: Monitors tasks/todo, assigns work to workers, tracks progress through doing to done.

worker-m3.description: Implements M3: AI OCR (Gemini API) and RAG chatbot (numpy TF-IDF). Backend services, API routers, schemas.

worker-m4.description: Implements M4: PDF (ReportLab) and Excel (openpyxl) report generation. Export endpoints and file streaming.

worker-m5.description: Implements M5: Next.js frontend UI, dashboard, calculator page, marketplace, chatbot page. Tailwind + shadcn/ui.

docs-engineer.description: Maintains README, API docs, architecture guides, deployment docs, developer onboarding, and examples. Keeps docs synchronized with code.
